testcase.name: runScenario["Verify Playwright Auto Wait Functionality", "IPL Points Table Validation"](1)
testcase.system-out:

bottom of the page&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.i_search_for_team()&amp#27;[0m Scrolled to bottom successfully &amp#27;[32mThen 0.551, 2111/230.4, 2047/238.0, 16, WWWWW ] [ 2 , , RCB , 11, 7, 4, 0, 1.103, 2026/195.1, 1973/212.4, 14, WLLWW ] [ 3 , , SRH , 12, 7, 5, 0, 0.331, 2418/237.1, 2295/232.4, 14, LWLWW ] [ 4 , , PBKS , 11, 6, 4, 1, 0.428, 2112/192.0, 2095/198.1, 13, LLLLW ] [ 5 , , CSK , 11, 6, 5, 0, 0.185, 2023/215.0, 1914/207.3, 12, WWWLW ] [ 6 , , RR , 11, 6, 5, 0, 0.082, 1996/200.3, 2057/208.2, 12, LLWLW ] [ 7 , , DC , 12, 5, 7, 0, -0.993, 2159/233.2, 2225/217.1, 10, WLLWL ] [ 8 , , KKR , 10, 4, 5, 1, -0.169, 1534/172.2, 1622/178.5, 9, WWWWL ] [ 9 , , MI , 11, 3, 8, 0, -0.585, 2026/208.5, 2083/202.3, 6, LWLLL ] [ 10 , , LSG , 11, 3, 8, 0, -0.907, 1910/218.5, 2004/208.0, 6, LWLLL ] Screenshot captured successfully [Batsman, Indian,

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify Screenshot And Scroll Functionality", "IPL Points Table Validation"](2)
testcase.system-out: [, ] [] [] [A 22-year old opening batsman who hails from Pune, Ruturaj Gaikwad has been a consistent performer for his state team Maharashtra. He was the highest run-getter for Maharashtra in the league stage of the Syed Mushtaq Ali Trophy 2018-19. At the IPL 2019 Player Auction, the Chennai Super Kings secured his services at his base price of INR 20 lacs., ] &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser prints the IPL points table&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.user_prints_the_ipl_points_table()&amp#27;[0m Total Teams: 16 &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mTotal IPL teams should be greater than 0&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.total_ipl_teams_should_be_greater_than_0()&amp#27;[0m Top Team Points: 2047/238.0 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mTop IPL team points should be displayed&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.top_ipl_team_points_should_be_displayed()&amp#27;[0m Is Team Present: true &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mTeam &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"MI"&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m should be present in the table&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.team_should_be_present_in_the_table(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m GT RCB SRH PBKS CSK RR DC KKR MI LSG &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser prints all IPL team names&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.user_prints_all_ipl_team_names()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Verify IPL Table Data", "IPL Points Table Validation"](3)
testcase.system-out: Screenshot captured successfully &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser captures screenshot with name &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"ipl-points-table"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepdefinitions.IPLPointTableValidationStepDefs.user_captures_screenshot_with_name(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
